message:
test(conformance): add pthread cond/mutex/thread conformance test harnesses

Add dedicated conformance test suites for three pthread fixture families:

- pthread_cond_conformance_test.rs (14 tests): validates pthread_cond.json
  covering init, destroy, wait, timedwait, signal, broadcast plus edge
  cases (spurious wakeup, mutex reacquisition, mutex mismatch)

- pthread_mutex_conformance_test.rs (12 tests): validates pthread_mutex.json
  covering init, lock, trylock, unlock, destroy

- pthread_thread_conformance_test.rs (13 tests): validates pthread_thread.json
  covering create, join, detach, self, equal, deadlock detection

Each harness validates fixture schema, coverage patterns, error codes,
function distribution, mode validity, case count stability, and POSIX
spec references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
